basics.name: Aditeya Baral
basics.label: AI Researcher
basics.summary: AI Researcher with a focus on Deep Learning and Natural Language Processing

work.name: Cisco Systems
work.summary: I work in the Media Quality Analytics team as a Big Data Analytics Engineer for Cisco Webex to compute real-time metrics from video and audio streams from meetings
highlights: Placed #1 Regionally and Top-20 Internationally at the Annual Cisco Webex Hackathon
Proposed a Federated Learning based approach to learn representations of users, topics and entities from conversational text and metadata

work.name: Cisco Systems
work.summary: I work in the VideoMesh Analytics & API team as a Big Data Analytics Engineer for Cisco Webex to compute real-time metrics from video and audio streams from meetings
highlights: Migrated streaming pipelines from Apache Spark to Apache Flink to reduce latency and improve performance
Developed a customer-facing dashboard using Webex Developer APIs for customers to monitor their data

awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to 'those who, during the preceding year, have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.'
